fields.name: dbId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the Supplier.

fields.name: companyDbId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the Supplier's company.

fields.name: company_companyNumber
fields.description: The company number (orgnr) of the Supplier's company.

fields.name: bankAccount
fields.description: The bank account of the Supplier.

fields.name: ownerDbId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the Supplier's owner.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the Supplier was created.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the Supplier was last modified.
